name: Fish and Potato Platter
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Salmon filets, cut into pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine the first six ingredients and cover. Chill.
2. Arrange potato slices around the edge of a round 12-inch platter. Cover and microwave on high for 3 minutes.
3. Uncover the platter and place the fish in a ring inside the potatoes, end to end.
4. Mound broccoli in the center of the platter.
5. Sprinkle the fish and potatoes with lemon juice, then cover. Microwave on high for an additional 8 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through and the potatoes are tender. Turn the dish over at 4-minute intervals.
6. Serve with a dill sauce.
